violations.text: Menu is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025
Scouring pad observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit gaskets have an accumulation of black residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2025

The ceiling above the 3-bay sink is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Tiles have water stains and black residue. These tiles are to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
The floor in some areas is in poor repair. Grout has receded below tile level. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
Bowl observed being rinsed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024

Individual cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024
The floor throughout the facility is in poor repair. Grout has receded below tile level. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

The ceiling at the cook/grill line is covered with a couple of tiles that are wood/plywood. This is not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Ceiling tiles must be replaced using materials that are smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. In addition, flooring in areas throughout the kitchen and warewashing room observed in poor repair. Grout has receded below tile level. Flooring must be maintained in good repair using materials that are smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the warewashing area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023
